title: Wrong error message on violating foreign key constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE t2 (b INT PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE t3 (a INT NOT NULL, b INT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (a) REFERENCES t1 (a), FOREIGN KEY (b) REFERENCES t2 (b));
key_bug_features: Inserting into t3 without t1 reference
